description: Wide graphic. The background is a styled photograph on a whitewashed wood surface: a white ceramic mug with a hand-drawn dotted heart, filled with tea, set in a chunky knit brown sweater or blanket, surrounded by orange and red maple leaves, cinnamon sticks tied with twine, and star anise. In the lower-left is the 'AskTSA' logo, a briefcase icon with a speech-bubble containing three dots, with the wordmark 'Ask TSA.' To the right, black text reads: '8 a.m. - 6 p.m. Sunday - Saturday / Even Holidays.'
notable_text: Ask TSA | 8 a.m. - 6 p.m. Sunday - Saturday Even Holidays
